highlights.description: D2 diagram visualization for hypothesis lifecycle and timeline
`ilspec visualize` command for generating D2/SVG diagrams
`--diagrams` flag to embed D2 code blocks in rendered Markdown

added.description: `pkg/visualize` package for D2 diagram generation using d2vision
`ilspec visualize` command with `--type hypothesis|timeline|all` and `--format d2|svg`
`--diagrams` flag for `ilspec render` to embed D2 code blocks
Hypothesis lifecycle diagram showing state transitions (proposed → investigating → validated)
Timeline diagram with evidence links and event source shapes

tests.description: Unit tests for visualize package: diagram generation, rendering

dependencies.description: github.com/grokify/d2vision for D2 code generation and SVG rendering

highlights.description: `ilspec init` command for scaffolding new incidents with phase-aware templates
JSON Schema runtime validation with embedded schema
`ilspec validate` command for validating incident JSON files
Premortem template for proactive failure simulation

added.description: `ilspec init` command with phase-aware templates and auto-generated IDs
JSON Schema runtime validation using santhosh-tekuri/jsonschema
`--schema-only` flag for JSON Schema validation only
`ilspec validate` command with required field and enum validation
Premortem Markdown template with failure scenarios, early warning signals, and mitigations

tests.description: Unit tests for validate command: required fields, enums, nested structures
Unit tests for schema package: validator creation, validation methods
Unit tests for types package: JSON round-trip, enum values
Unit tests for render package: template rendering, view helpers

documentation.description: Premortem example JSON for proactive failure simulation
Postmortem example JSON for full incident analysis
README updated with validate command usage

build.description: GoReleaser configuration for cross-platform binary releases

highlights.description: Unified incident lifecycle schema spanning premortem, intra-mortem, and postmortem phases
CLI tool for rendering incident JSON to Markdown with phase-aware template selection

added.description: JSON Schema for incident lifecycle artifacts with timeline, hypotheses, action items, and evidence
Go types matching schema with type-safe enums for phase, severity, status, and confidence levels
Markdown renderer with embedded templates for intra-mortem and postmortem phases
`ilspec render` command with auto-detection of template based on incident phase
Auto-generated output filenames based on phase (e.g., `incident-update.md` for intra-mortem)
`--output` flag for explicit output file, use `-` for stdout

documentation.description: README with lifecycle model explanation, architecture diagram, and usage instructions
DESIGN_PRINCIPLES covering schema navigability, nesting limits, and schemakit integration
Example intra-mortem incident JSON demonstrating schema usage

internal.description: Go module initialization with cobra dependency
